subject: This week in product: 5 articles you can't miss
bodyExcerpt: Hi Jane, here are this week's top reads from the product community. Five must-read articles on roadmaps, prioritization, and stakeholder alignment. You're receiving this because you subscribed to ProductWeekly. Manage your subscriptions or unsubscribe at any time.
notes: Newsletter footer triggers the 0.95 noise pattern via 'unsubscribe' and 'manage your subscriptions'.
